sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, dateTimeValue String);
SELECT id, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrZero(dateTimeValue, 3) AS parsedDate FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET dateTimeValue = 'invalid-format-date' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrZero(dateTimeValue, 3) AS parsedDate FROM test_dates WHERE id = 2;
